_instructions: Rename this file to sync_config.json and fill in session_key.
1. Open claude.ai in Chrome/Safari while logged in.
2. Open DevTools (Cmd+Opt+I on Mac, F12 on Windows/Linux).
4. Find the 'sessionKey' row and copy its Value (starts with sk-ant-sid01-).
5. Paste it below as the value of session_key.
The cookie expires every ~30 days. When sync.py errors with 401,
org_uuid is auto-discovered on first run -- leave it blank.
anthropic_api_key is optional. If set, newly ingested chats are
auto-classified using the Anthropic API. You can also set the
